label: Latency Summary
description: Service list with p50, p95, and p99 latency percentiles and latency vs data mode toggles.

0.6.note: isLoading spinner guard at top of render ✓.

1.1.note: Data from useMarketsData().latencyMetrics — no inline fetch ✓.

1.3.note: Latency metrics are infrastructure-level — not per-org/client/strategy.

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab + f9f29ea. Re-audit only if wiring test fails or entitlements change.

3.1.note: Modes: live ✓ / batch ✓ (latencyDataMode toggle in widget shows live/batch/compare) / paper ✓.

3.2.note: Context reads useExecutionMode(); latency widget has independent latencyDataMode toggle ✓.

3.3.note: No order submission in latency summary widget.

3.4.note: Human: confirm batch indicator visible in layout.

3.5.note: Paper mode: same display as live for infrastructure metrics.

3.6.note: No WebSocket or timer. MOCK_LATENCY_METRICS is static fixture.

l3.notes: Agent checks 3.1/3.2/3.5/3.6 pass. 3.3 N/A. Human needed for 3.4.

4.1.note: Row click setSelectedLatencyService() is functional (drives latency-detail). Clear selection button has onClick={()=>setSelectedLatencyService(null)} ✓.

4.3.note: Human: verify p50/p95/p99 columns legible in all 3 data modes.

4.4.note: Human: click a service row — confirm latency-detail widget updates.

4.7.note: No tabs or accordion — mode toggles are simple Button rows.

4.8.note: Human: verify scroll with many services.

5.1.note: Target: infrastructure/ops teams monitoring service latency. Provides cross-service p50/p95/p99 table with live/batch/compare mode. Selection drives markets-latency-detail.

l6.notes: L1.5 harness spec: 8 tests covering loading/error/empty states, service name and stage count rendering, View/Data mode controls, Clear selection button, and 'Live vs batch' badge. See tests/widgets/markets/markets-latency-summary.test.tsx

7.1.note: No hardcoded hex/rgb/hsl. Uses CSS vars (--pnl-positive, --pnl-negative, --status-live, --status-warning, --status-critical) ✓. Fixed: was --status-error (wrong name) → --status-critical.

7.2.note: No mock data in widget file ✓.

7.5.note: Out of scope — English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21; 7.5 reassigned to UTC datetime rendering

8.1.note: text-[10px] x15 and text-[9px] x6 throughout service list rows (lines 56-221). HFT density pattern — no Tailwind token below text-xs. Deferred pending --text-hft-label token.

8.3.note: Uses Button, Badge from components/ui/*. Service rows use <button type='button'> — semantically correct primitive ✓.

8.4.note: No bare , no unlabelled . Service rows use

8.5.note: Human: verify layout at minW=4, minH=3.

l8.notes: 8.1 deferred (text-[10px] HFT density). 8.2/8.3/8.4 pass. 8.5 pending human.

keepSeparate.rationale: Summary drives detail — classic master/detail split. Both can exist independently in different presets.

relationships.notes: Row click sets selectedLatencyService which drives markets-latency-detail widget. Natural master/detail pair.

dataContract.notes: Mock: MOCK_LATENCY_METRICS static fixture. Production: polling latency metrics API at ~5s interval. Widget has independent latencyDataMode (live/batch/compare) toggle.

gaps: batch.p50/p95/p99 sub-object needs verification against MOCK_LATENCY_METRICS fixture
coverage.notes: Infrastructure-level latency monitoring. Not strategy-specific. Compare mode shows live vs batch delta per service.

knownIssues: batch.p50/p95/p99 sub-object on LatencyMetric — verify populated by MOCK_LATENCY_METRICS fixture before L4 sign-off.

findings.description: markets-latency-summary-widget.tsx:153 — bg-[var(--status-error)] used for critical status dot (wrong token name)

findings.fix: Retired 7.5 i18n check: English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21

findings.description: markets-latency-summary-widget.tsx:56-221 — text-[10px]/text-[9px] used throughout service list rows
findings.deferReason: No Tailwind scale token below text-xs (12px). HFT density pattern. Requests --text-hft-label token (10px).
findings.fix: Replaced text-[10px] with text-micro and text-[9px] with text-nano across view/data toggles, selection labels, and per-service p50/p95/p99 cells.
